in.description: Rate of input (in bytes/second) for an operation since the last time isi statistics collected the data.

in_avg.description: Average input (received) bytes for an operation, in bytes.

in_max.description: Maximum input (received) bytes for an operation, in bytes.

in_min.description: Minimum input (received) bytes for an operation, in bytes.

local_addr.description: The IP address (in dotted-quad form) of the host receiving the operation request.

local_name.description: The resolved text name of the LocalAddr, if resolution can be performed.

node.description: The node on which the operation was performed.

num_operations.description: The number of times an operation has been performed.

operation_rate.description: The rate (in ops/second) at which an operation has been performed.

out.description: Rate of output (in bytes/second) for an operation since the last time isi statistics collected the data.

out_avg.description: Average output (sent) bytes for an operation, in bytes.

out_max.description: Maximum output (sent) bytes for an operation, in bytes.

out_min.description: Minimum output (sent) bytes for an operation, in bytes.

remote_addr.description: The IP address (in dotted-quad form) of the host sending the operation request.

remote_name.description: The resolved text name of the RemoteAddr, if resolution can be performed.

time.description: Unix Epoch time in seconds of the request.

time_avg.description: The average elapsed time (in microseconds) taken to complete an operation.

time_max.description: The maximum elapsed time (in microseconds) taken to complete an operation.

time_min.description: The minimum elapsed time (in microseconds) taken to complete an operation.

type.description: Specifies properties for a persona, which consists of either a 'type' and a 'name' or an 'ID'.

id.description: Specifies the serialized form of a persona, which can be 'UID:0', 'USER:name', 'GID:0', 'GROUP:wheel', or 'SID:S-1-1'.

name.description: Specifies the persona name, which must be combined with a type.

type.description: Specifies the type of persona, which must be combined with a name.
